ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_statistics" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year of the statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the demographic statistics */,
  "yearly_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in population from the previous year */,
  "yearly_population_change" INTEGER /* Net change in population over the year */,
  "net_migrants" INTEGER /* Net number of migrants to/from the country */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Average number of children born per woman */,
  "density_per_km2" REAL /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  "urbanization_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Total urban population */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country this data belongs to */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., based on source reliability, sampling methods) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government reports, surveys) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_share_of_world_population" REAL /* Percentage of world population that resides in the country */,
  "global_rank" INTEGER /* Country's rank based on population size globally */,
  "world_population" INTEGER /* Total world population */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region the country belongs to (e.g., South Asia, Western Europe) */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., high-income, low-income) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urbanization_trends" (
  "urbanization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urbanization trend entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistic */,
  "urban_pop_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "urban_population_change" INTEGER /* Change in urban population from the previous year */,
  "urban_area_km2" REAL /* Total urban area in square kilometers */,
  "urban_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of urban growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urbanization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urbanization_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_data" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country data */,
  "net_migrants" INTEGER /* Net number of migrants to/from the country */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Rate of migration */,
  "remittances" INTEGER /* Total remittances received by the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_statistics" (
  "age_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age statistic entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country data */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "youth_dependency_ratio" REAL /* Youth dependency ratio (population under 15 / working-age population) */,
  "elderly_dependency_ratio" REAL /* Elderly dependency ratio (population 65 and older / working-age population) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertility_rates" (
  "fertility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertility rate entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country data */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Average number of children born per woman */,
  "total_fertility_rate" REAL /* Total fertility rate (average number of children per woman per lifetime) */,
  "general_fertility_rate" REAL /* General fertility rate (number of births per 1,000 women of childbearing age) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_density" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country data */,
  "density_per_km2" REAL /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  "land_area_km2" REAL /* Total land area in square kilometers */,
  "population_per_hectare" REAL /* Population per hectare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_density_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_density_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic change entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country data */,
  "yearly_population_change" INTEGER /* Net yearly change in population */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of population growth */,
  "natural_increase_rate" REAL /* Rate of natural increase (births - deaths) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_changes_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES population_statistics ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_changes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "world_population" (
  "world_pop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each world population record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the world population statistic */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total world population */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of population growth */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the world population living in urban areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("world_pop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, survey) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
